title: Seeing the northern lights
body:
O.P.
Currently doing some research into options to see the Northern lights. This is something my parents always wanted to do but likely won't do unless I go on the trip with them.
I've had peeps on Discord recommend Alaska. I've read that Canada is also viable. And of course, there's northern Europe... Iceland, Norway, Sweden, etc.
From a language point of view, I'm erring towards Alaska.
Though, I'm not sure what else there is for us to do while we wait for the opportunity for seeing the northern lights.
Just wanting some thoughts from people who've made the trek to see the northern lights... where did you go? what else could you get up to there?
